complications: However, others warn the area is cursed.
But rumor has it someone else is also looking for the same thing.
The last person who tried never came back.
However, the road there has become increasingly dangerous.
Strangely, no animal will go near the area.
The authorities have forbidden anyone from going there.
There may be more to this story than meets the eye.
questItems: a silver locket containing a family portrait
a leather-bound journal filled with encoded secrets
a signet ring bearing a noble house's crest
a blessed holy relic wrapped in velvet
an ancient map etched on bronze plates
a crystal vial filled with a shimmering, unknown liquid
a set of master-crafted thieves' tools
a small music box that plays an eerie, haunting melody
a skull carved from a single enormous ruby
a heavy iron key covered in strange runes
a finely crafted astrolabe of dwarven make
a bundle of letters sealed with black wax
a glass eye that occasionally glows faintly
a taxidermied raven with gemstone eyes

city: a letter of introduction to a noble

missingPerson.label: Missing Person
templates: {npcName}'s {relation} went to explore near {targetName} ({targetHex}) {timeframe} and hasn't returned. Reward: {reward}.
A desperate {npcName} begs for help — their {relation} was dragged away by unknown assailants toward {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} received a bloodstained scrap of cloth belonging to their {relation}, who was last seen heading toward {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
Search parties sent toward {targetName} ({targetHex}) looking for {npcName}'s {relation} have themselves gone missing. Reward: {reward}.
A traveling merchant claims to have seen a prisoner matching {npcName}'s {relation}'s description being taken into {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} hasn't heard from their {relation} since {timeframe}. Their {relation} mentioned going near {targetName} ({targetHex}) to gather herbs. Reward: {reward}.
A strange ransom note appeared at {npcName}'s door demanding gold for the return of their {relation}, last seen near {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
{npcName}'s {relation} vanished from the road near {targetName} ({targetHex}). Only their shoes were found, arranged neatly at the roadside. Reward: {reward}.

lostItem.label: Lost Item
templates: {npcName} believes {questItem} was stolen and hidden somewhere inside {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
A dying traveler told {npcName} that {questItem} can be found deep within {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
{npcName}'s {questItem} was seized by raiders who are now holed up in {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
According to an old map, {questItem} was buried somewhere in {targetName} ({targetHex}) generations ago. {npcName} will pay well for its recovery. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} foolishly gambled away {questItem} to a creature reportedly laired in {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
A thief confessed under interrogation that they stashed {questItem} inside {targetName} ({targetHex}) before being caught. {npcName} wants it back. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName}'s {questItem} was lost when a caravan was ambushed near {targetName} ({targetHex}). The bandits fled inside. Reward: {reward}.
An ancestor of {npcName} was entombed with {questItem} somewhere in {targetName} ({targetHex}). The family needs it back desperately. Reward: {reward}.

delivery.label: Delivery
templates: {npcName} needs {goods} delivered safely to {targetName} ({targetHex}). The roads are dangerous. Reward: {reward}.
Urgent medicine must reach {targetName} ({targetHex}) before the week's end. {npcName} can't make the journey alone. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} has a sealed package — no questions asked — that must reach a contact in {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
A wagon loaded with {goods} bound for {targetName} ({targetHex}) needs armed guards. The previous escort was found dead on the road. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} owes a significant debt to someone in {targetName} ({targetHex}) and needs {goods} delivered as payment before collectors arrive. Reward: {reward}.
The temple requires sacred relics transported to the shrine in {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} fears they will be stolen en route. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} inherited property in {targetName} ({targetHex}) and needs important legal documents delivered to the magistrate there. Reward: {reward}.
A merchant caravan carrying {goods} to {targetName} ({targetHex}) was forced to turn back by bandits. {npcName} needs the delivery completed. Reward: {reward}.

escort.label: Escort
templates: {npcName} needs safe passage to {targetName} ({targetHex}). They've heard terrible things about the road. Reward: {reward}.
A frightened {npcName} must reach {targetName} ({targetHex}) before {timeframe} ends, or face dire consequences. They need bodyguards. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName}, a scholar, wishes to study something near {targetName} ({targetHex}) but requires armed protection. Reward: {reward}.
A noble's child must be secretly escorted to {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} insists on absolute discretion. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} is a witness to a crime and must reach {targetName} ({targetHex}) to testify. Powerful people want them silenced. Reward: {reward}.
A healer named {npcName} must reach {targetName} ({targetHex}) to treat a plague outbreak, but the route is infested with monsters. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} is transporting a dangerous prisoner to {targetName} ({targetHex}) and needs additional muscle. Reward: {reward}.
An elderly {npcName} wants to make a pilgrimage to {targetName} ({targetHex}) one last time before they die. Reward: {reward}.

monsterBounty.label: Monster Bounty
templates: A {monster} has been spotted near {targetName} ({targetHex}), terrorizing travelers. {npcName} has posted a bounty. Reward: {reward}.
Livestock have been disappearing near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} suspects a {monster} is responsible. Reward: {reward}.
Hunters report that a {monster} has made a lair somewhere near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} wants its head. Reward: {reward}.
A pack of creatures led by a {monster} raided a farmstead near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} demands retribution. Reward: {reward}.
The road to {targetName} ({targetHex}) has become impassable due to a {monster}. {npcName} needs the trade route cleared. Reward: {reward}.
A {monster} dragged a woodcutter into the wilds near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} wants the beast slain before it strikes again. Reward: {reward}.
Refugees arriving from near {targetName} ({targetHex}) speak of a {monster} that hunts by night. {npcName} is organizing a response. Reward: {reward}.
A {monster} has begun demanding tribute from travelers near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} says enough is enough. Reward: {reward}.

investigation.label: Investigation
templates: Strange lights have been appearing near {targetName} ({targetHex}) every night. {npcName} wants someone to investigate. Reward: {reward}.
The water supply from near {targetName} ({targetHex}) has turned foul and black. {npcName} needs to know why. Reward: {reward}.
People who pass near {targetName} ({targetHex}) report hearing voices calling their names. {npcName} wants answers. Reward: {reward}.
Animals in the area around {targetName} ({targetHex}) are behaving erratically — fleeing in one direction. {npcName} fears dark magic. Reward: {reward}.
A massive sinkhole opened overnight near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} wants to know what's beneath. Reward: {reward}.
An ancient ward stone near {targetName} ({targetHex}) has cracked. {npcName} worries about what it was sealing away. Reward: {reward}.
Flowers near {targetName} ({targetHex}) bloom only at midnight and wilt by dawn. {npcName}, an herbalist, suspects something unnatural. Reward: {reward}.
A star fell from the sky and struck the earth near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} wants to know what remains at the impact site. Reward: {reward}.

rivalry.label: Rivalry
templates: {npcName} suspects merchants from {targetName} ({targetHex}) are deliberately undercutting local prices to ruin their business. They need proof. Reward: {reward}.
A dispute with {targetName} ({targetHex}) over water rights is escalating. {npcName} needs someone to negotiate, or intimidate. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} believes {targetName} ({targetHex}) has been harboring bandits who raid local caravans. They need an outsider to expose the truth. Reward: {reward}.
A prized {goods} shipment was intercepted before reaching its destination. {npcName} believes agents from {targetName} ({targetHex}) are responsible. Reward: {reward}.
The leader of {targetName} ({targetHex}) publicly insulted the locals. {npcName} wants a response delivered — diplomatically or otherwise. Reward: {reward}.
Counterfeit coins bearing the mark of {targetName} ({targetHex}) are flooding the local market. {npcName} needs someone to trace their source. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} wants to establish a trade agreement with {targetName} ({targetHex}), but the last envoy was sent back with a black eye. Reward: {reward}.
Cattle branded with the mark of {targetName} ({targetHex}) have been found in local pastures. {npcName} smells a setup and wants the truth. Reward: {reward}.

treasureHunt.label: Treasure Hunt
templates: A dying prospector whispered to {npcName} about a hidden vault deep inside {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: a share of whatever is found.
{npcName} purchased an old map that marks {targetName} ({targetHex}) as the resting place of an ancient warlord's treasure hoard. They need someone brave enough to go look. Reward: {reward}.
Legend says a dragon once kept its hoard in {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} believes some of it remains, guarded by whatever moved in since. Reward: a cut of the take.
A coded message found in a library book points to {targetName} ({targetHex}) as the hiding spot of a legendary enchanted weapon. {npcName} wants it found. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} found a jeweler's receipt from a century ago for gems deposited in a vault beneath {targetName} ({targetHex}). Time to make a withdrawal. Reward: {reward}.
An old ballad names {targetName} ({targetHex}) as where a pirate king buried his plunder. {npcName} thinks the song is more than fiction. Reward: a generous share.
A ghost appeared to {npcName} in a dream, begging them to recover its earthly possessions from {targetName} ({targetHex}). Reward: {reward}.
{npcName} claims a rival adventuring party is already heading to {targetName} ({targetHex}) for its rumored treasure. They want someone to beat them there. Reward: {reward}.

sabotage.label: Sabotage
templates: Something near {targetName} ({targetHex}) is poisoning the local river. {npcName} needs it identified and stopped. Reward: {reward}.
The old signal tower near {targetName} ({targetHex}) was destroyed overnight. {npcName} fears it was deliberate and wants the saboteurs found. Reward: {reward}.
Bridge timbers near {targetName} ({targetHex}) were found sawn nearly through. {npcName} needs to know who and why before someone dies. Reward: {reward}.
Stakes and pit traps have appeared on the road near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} wants the culprits caught alive if possible. Reward: {reward}.
Someone has been setting fires in the forest near {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} needs the arsonist stopped before the whole region burns. Reward: {reward}.
Warning markers near {targetName} ({targetHex}) have been moved to lead travelers into dangerous terrain. {npcName} needs them restored and the vandals found. Reward: {reward}.
Crops on farms near {targetName} ({targetHex}) are dying from a blight that smells alchemical, not natural. {npcName} wants the source found. Reward: {reward}.
Hunting traps near {targetName} ({targetHex}) have been sprung and smashed. {npcName} suspects a druid or ranger is responsible and wants to talk to them. Reward: {reward}.

rescue.label: Rescue
templates: A group of miners is trapped inside {targetName} ({targetHex}) after a cave-in. {npcName} is desperate for help. Reward: {reward}.
A patrol of soldiers entered {targetName} ({targetHex}) and never reported back. {npcName} needs someone to find them. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName}'s apprentice ventured into {targetName} ({targetHex}) on a foolish dare. It's been three days. Reward: {reward}.
A pilgrim group was captured by bandits operating out of {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} is raising funds for a rescue mission. Reward: {reward}.
A messenger carrying vital intelligence is being held prisoner in {targetName} ({targetHex}). {npcName} needs them freed immediately. Reward: {reward}.
{npcName}'s expedition to map {targetName} ({targetHex}) went horribly wrong. Only one member escaped to tell the tale. The rest are still alive — probably. Reward: {reward}.
An adventuring party accepted a contract to clear {targetName} ({targetHex}) but hasn't emerged. {npcName}, their patron, fears the worst. Reward: {reward}.
A child from the village wandered into {targetName} ({targetHex}) chasing a stray cat. {npcName} heard screaming from inside. Reward: {reward}.
